locations.name: Samuel Washington Woodhouse
locations.summary: Samuel Washington Woodhouse (June 27, 1821 – October 23, 1904) was an American surgeon, explorer and naturalist.

relations.subject: Black-capped vireo
relations.evidence: The black-capped vireo (Vireo atricapilla) is a small bird native to the United States and Mexico

relations.subject: Black-capped vireo
relations.evidence: The black-capped vireo is threatened by brown-headed cowbird (Molothrus ater) brood parasitism, human disturbance, loss of habitat to urbanization, fire exclusion, livestock grazing, and brush control. The species was listed as an Endangered Species on 6 October 1987, "due to such factors as urbanization, grazing, range improvement, and succession."{{cite web|author=U.S
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
